text: I feel intrigued and slightly disoriented in this highly designed space. The tilted angles and glass walls evoke a sense of modernity and reflection, blurring the boundaries between myself and my surroundings. Entering the vibrant, information-rich R+D area, I am absorbed in thoughts about innovation and how humans attempt to make sense of complex, interconnected realities. I feel a mixture of curiosity and anticipation, eager to explore the ideas presented here yet aware of my own smallness within this carefully curated environment.
